turns.user_message: I used to feel so much lighter about things. Now I just feel heavy all the time.
I keep replaying old mistakes and I can't seem to shake them off. It's like I'm stuck in a loop.
I think this weight is just who I am now. I don't believe I deserve to feel anything else.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This has been going on for a while.
